details.IncidentDetail: "[11] [Notification] [CHP]-RP IS LL ADV THEY ARE STILL ON RHS * RP INSIST SHE IS JSO IOWA [Shared]"

"[9] CONSTRUCTION HAS ACTIVE CLOSURE FROM 07:00 TILL 17:00 FOR DRAINAGE WORK "
"[6] 101-32 DOESN'T KNOW IF IT IS OPEN OR CLOSED"
"[2] QUICKMAPS APPEARS TO BE UPDATED CORRECTLY SHOWING THE CLOSURE "
"[1] MULTIPLE PUBLIC CALLS FROM PTYS IRRATE THAT THE CT WEBSITE SAYS 38 IS OPEN - HOWEVER WHEN THEY DRIVE UP ITS CLOSED"
"[9] [Appended, 15:34:38] [2] A COUPLE OF PIECES OF PLYWOOD IN THE RDWY"
"[2] LARGE RED ROLLING TRAY IN #3 LN "
"[8] WOODEN TRLR WOULD HAVE TC DMG TO DRVR SIDE "
"[6] RP WAS SCARED AND CALLED SON FIRST WHEN TC HAPPENED // HE HELPED HER TO CALM DOWN AND EXIT"
